productDisplayName: Nike Women's Power Sphere Polo T-shirt
description: CompositionFuchsia polo tee in Dri-Fit polyester, with nike heat transfer swooshFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean At the court, on the beach or simply enjoying those healthy runs, there's no better way to do it than in this nike tennis tee. Smart to look at and engineered with Dry-Fit technology to ensure you stay dry and fresh all day, there's nothing better an active woman can ask for. Pair it with shorts or skirts and sports shoes to complete that uber cool look.
